data.description: You can call forth a pulse of force to damage creatures in an area and potentially scatter them.

VOU can use your action to touch a willing humanoid and perceive through its senses until the end of your next As as creature on same is the turno long the plane existence you, can your as you use action of this turos maintain connection, subsequent to extending the duration until the end ofyour turno While the creature's perceiving through other you benefit from any special creature, and you are blinded and deafened your surroundings.

Vou can cast slow once a spell Vou using warIock slol. can't do so again until you finish a long resl.
VOU can cast silent image at will, without expending a spell or

You can shape the arcane energy of your eldritch invocations into a searing ball of flame. On your turn, you can cause an explosion centered on a point you can see within 60 feet. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Prerequisite: 5th level, Pact of the Blade feature
You can cast *arcane eye* with a spell slot, without expending the slot.

entities.name: Vou can cast speak with dead at will, without expending a slot.

data.description: You can cast the speak with dead spell at will, without expending a spell slot. This invocation mimics the effect of the spell, allowing you to converse with the dead as if it were cast.
